mission.title: kcp: 🌱  Tunnel: Validate namespace/pod at the syncer side
mission.description:
## Summary

This PR adds an extra layer of security at the syncer side of the tunneler to ensure that the proxied requests are against a namespace owned by the syncer and a pod in upsync state. 

## Related issue(s)

Fixes https://github.com/kcp-dev/kcp/issues/1975

steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
